title: `Amasa' #6021
definition:
Amasa = "burden"

 1) son of Ithra or Jether by Abigail the sister of David and general
    of the army of Absalom
 2) son of Hadlai and a prince of Ephraim in the reign of king Ahaz
nasbUsage:
